title: Artificial Intelligence
titleLarge: Vision-based AI technology solutions for intelligent automation and decision-making
desc: Sparrow Softtech Company is an AI service provider company based on Artificial Intelligence (AI) Technology. We mainly work on Vision Based technology to create intelligent machines that can assist humans in a variety of ways.
shortDesc: AI-powered solutions using vision-based technology for intelligent automation.
desc1: Artificial intelligence (AI) is the ability of a computer or a robot controlled by a computer to do tasks that are usually done by human beings because they require human intelligence and ability to judge well. AI makes people's lives more efficient, powering many programs and services that help them do everyday things.
desc2: On a worldwide level, the phenomenon of Artificial Intelligence is changing the world socially, politically, and economically. Google assistance, SIRI, Alexa, smart cars are prime examples of artificial intelligence. From business, healthcare, militia, to education, gaming, entertainment and much more.
desc3: Artificial Intelligence has various applications in today's society. It is becoming essential for today's time because it can solve complex problems in an efficient way in multiple industries, such as Healthcare, Social Media, Gaming, Robotics, Automotive Industry, Education, Entertainment, finance, etc.

process.title: AI Development Process
process.titleLarge: Developing intelligent systems using vision-based AI technology
process.desc: We develop AI solutions using machine learning and deep learning to create intelligent systems that can make decisions and perform actions in the real world.

title: Industrial Automation
titleLarge: Industrial automation solutions with diversified and solid structure for manufacturing excellence
desc: Sparrow Softtech Company is an industrial automation service provider with a diversified and solid structure. We use control systems, computers, and robots to handle different processes and machineries in industries.
shortDesc: Complete industrial automation solutions using control systems and robotics.
desc1: Industrial automation is the use of control systems, such as computers or robots, and information technologies for handling completely different processes and machineries in an industry to replace a human being. The benefits of automated operations are higher productivity, reliability, availability, increased performance, and reduced operating costs.
desc2: Automation includes the use of different equipment and control systems such as machinery, processes in factories, boilers, and heat-treating ovens, switching on telephone networks, steering, and stabilization of ships, aircraft, and vehicles with reduced human intervention.
desc3: Automation allows companies to supply products for lower prices. Automation leads to significant economies of scale and enables firms to reduce the number of workers while maintaining consistent production and quality.

process.title: Automation Process
process.titleLarge: Industrial automation solutions for enhanced productivity and efficiency
process.desc: We develop automated systems that ensure consistent production and results, allowing better control over production rates and quality.

title: Robotics
titleLarge: Intelligent robotics solutions for autonomous machines and automated operations
desc: Robotics is a branch of engineering that involves the conception, design, manufacture and operation of robots. We create intelligent machines that can assist humans in a variety of ways.
shortDesc: Engineering solutions for autonomous robots and intelligent machines.
desc1: A robot is an autonomous machine capable of sensing its environment, carrying out computations to make decisions, and performing actions in the real world. The six most common types of robots are autonomous mobile robots (AMRs), automated guided vehicles (AGVs), robotic arms, humanoid robots, and hybrids.
desc2: Robots eliminate dangerous jobs for humans because they are capable of working in hazardous environments. They can handle lifting heavy loads, toxic substances and repetitive tasks. This has helped companies to prevent many accidents, also saving time and money.
desc3: Typical applications of robots include welding, painting, assembly, disassembly, pick and place for printed circuit boards, packaging and labelling, palletizing, product inspection, and testing; all accomplished with high endurance, speed, and precision.

process.title: Robotics Development
process.titleLarge: Creating intelligent robots for various industrial and commercial applications
process.desc: We design and develop robots that can sense their environment, make intelligent decisions, and perform actions with precision and reliability.

desc2: Our embedded system development process involves complete designing and time estimation of workflow for product or service. We develop with perfection and precision robust, secure, and user-friendly embedded solutions.
